channel.title: TeslaBlog.eu — Tesla News & Updates
channel.description: Latest Tesla news, deals, and updates across Europe and beyond.

item.title: Elon Musk calls out $2 trillion SpaceX IPO valuation as ‘BS’
item.description: Elon Musk is quick to call out any false information regarding him or his companies on his social media platform, known as X. A recent report that claimed SpaceX was aiming to go public with an IPO in the coming weeks at a massive valuation of $2 trillion was called out by Musk, who referred to i...

item.title: More Bad News Is About to Hit Tesla's Earnings
item.description: For years, leasing was a great option for consumers to offset high EV price tags, as well as rapidly developing technology, but now those leases are coming back, and that could mean big problems.

item.title: The final days of the Tesla Model X and S are here. All bets are on the Cybercab.
item.description: It's a new era for Tesla — and one that will rely on its ability to launch the Cybercab and mass-produce the Optimus robot.

item.title: Tesla Stumbles As Rivian Gains Q1 Edge
item.description: Delivery miss contrasts with Rivian's steady growth

item.title: Tesla Stock Drops on Deliveries. What Wall Street Is Saying.
item.description: Tesla stock slid after first-quarter deliveries missed expectations, prompting analysts including Goldman Sachs and Baird to lower price targets.

item.title: Elon Musk reveals date of SpaceX Starship v3’s maiden voyage
item.description: SpaceX CEO Elon Musk has revealed the timeline for the next Starship launch. It will be the first launch using SpaceX’s revamped design for Starship, as its v3 rocket will take its maiden voyage sooner than many might expect. Musk announced on April 3 on X that the next Starship flight test, and ...

item.title: SpaceX Targets Over $2 Trillion Valuation in Potential IPO
item.description: Company floats valuation ahead of investor meetings, with listing possibly in June and proceeds reaching up to $75 billion.

item.title: “Struggling” Tesla Stock (TSLA) Slumps as Q1 Vehicle Deliveries Miss Forecasts
item.description: Tesla (TSLA) slumped 3% today after it reported that Q1 delivery numbers had missed market expectations, raising fears that it wasn’t doing enough to combat rising competition in the market. Missed Market Forecasts The Elon Musk-led EV maker said it had delivered 358,023 vehicles during the perio...

item.title: Were Elon’s Politics A Significant Part of Cruddy Q1 Sales?
item.description: Let’s start with the hard numbers on this one. The Q1 2026 delivery numbers are officially out, and Tesla managed to deliver 358,023 vehicles. If you’re keeping track at home, that’s a pretty rough drop compared to the 386,810 cars they moved back in Q1 of 2024.

item.title: Tesla reports Q1 deliveries of 358,023, production of 408,386 vehicles
item.description: Tesla (TSLA) stated: “In the first quarter, we produced over 408,000 vehicles, delivered over 358,000 vehicles and deployed 8.8 GWh of energy storage products.” Tesla will post its financial results for the first quarter of 2026 after market close on Wednesday, April 22, the company noted.End of ...

item.title: Alphabet vs. Tesla: This stock is just an 'immense cash flow machine'
item.description: Yahoo Finance's "Market Madness" tournament has whittled down the competition of top-performing companies, pairing Alphabet (GOOG, GOOGL) against Tesla (TSLA) and Palantir Technologies (PLTR) against Walmart (WMT) in today's matchups.Carnegie Investment Counsel director of research Greg Halter de...

item.title: Tesla’s Little Miracle
item.description: Tesla’s (NASDAQ: TSLA) stock reacted poorly to its first-quarter sales count. It fell short of expectations for some. The big EV company produced 408,383 and delivered 358,023.

item.title: These 4 High-Yield ETFs Promise Big Payouts, but Only 1 Looks Truly Safe
item.description: Global X SuperDividend ETF (NYSEARCA: SDIV), Invesco KBW High Dividend Yield Financial ETF (NASDAQ: KBWD), YieldMax TSLA Option Income Strategy ETF (NYSEARCA: TSLY), and YieldMax NVDA Option Income Strategy ETF (NYSEARCA: NVDY) each promise outsized income, but the sources and sustainability of t...

item.title: Tesla Targets Japan's Top Imported Car Spot
item.description: The EV maker is betting that more stores and test drives can unlock a slower market.

item.title: Used Tesla For $25,000
item.description: A new Tesla (NASDAQ: TSLA) Model 3 with All-Wheel Drive has a base price of just $50,000. A similarly featured Model Y costs about the same. Each is priced below the industry average for a new EV, which is $60,000.

item.title: Tesla Deliveries: Elon Musk 'Actively Sacrificing' EV Business For AI
item.description: Tesla missed expectations for first-quarter deliveries. On Thursday, Tesla was the worst-performing stock in the S&P 500

item.title: Here is What to Know Beyond Why Tesla, Inc. (TSLA) is a Trending Stock
item.description: Tesla (TSLA) has received quite a bit of attention from Zacks.com users lately. Therefore, it is wise to be aware of the facts that can impact the stock's prospects.

item.title: Wedbush Goes Bullish on Tesla -- Sees 65% Upside Calls Weak Quarter 'No Surprise
item.description: Tesla Faces Weak EV Demand, Still Wins Big AI Bet: Wedbush

item.title: Bloomberg: Tesla’s AI dreams don’t change reality, cars still pay the bills
item.description: I’ve been watching Tesla’s delivery numbers pretty much every quarter for years now, and this one landed with a thud. Tesla delivered 358,000 vehicles in Q1 2026, missing Wall Street’s expectation of 372,000, and Bloomberg’s Global Business Editor Craig cut right to the heart of it on air. Yeah, ...

item.title: SpaceX Is Worth $2 Trillion? What That Might Mean.
item.description: SpaceX is worth how much? Bloomberg reported Thursday that SpaceX was seeking an initial public offering valuation of about $2 trillion, up from earlier estimates of $1.8 trillion. SpaceX was valued at $1.25 trillion after its merger in February with xAI.

item.title: Tesla Is Sitting On A Record 50,000 Unsold EVs
item.description: The American EV brand’s sales rebounded in the first quarter, but a new problem is making its presence felt.

item.title: This Artificial Intelligence (AI) Stock Could Be a Hidden Gem (and Here's Why)
item.description: Tesla stock is expensive. But the upside potential is clear.

item.title: Tesla eyes Japan's top imported-car spot as it expands store, service network
item.description: TOKYO, April 3 (Reuters) - Tesla plans to expand in Japan to at least 60 stores as it seeks to become the country's biggest imported car brand by as early as next year, the head of its Japan business

item.title: Model YL officially starts sales in South Korea
item.description: Model YL is now available in Korea. https://preview.redd.it/are5fhfcnwsg1.png?width=3232&format=png&auto=webp&s=f53c7712c731c7cca635bfc7e51504c0e1c56019 https://preview.redd.it/jk59nd4dtxsg1.png?width=3234&format=png&auto=webp&s=5735d10d804d6c4ac1cd3c19fa2f3b7db92700da https://preview.redd.it/q6l...

item.title: Under the Skin of America’s Humanoid Robots: Chinese Technology
item.description: Tesla and others turn to suppliers in China for components in an industry seen as strategic by both Washington and Beijing.

item.title: Dow Jones Futures Fall With Jobs Report Due; Stock Market Hasn't Done This Yet
item.description: The stock market rose strongly for the week, even with oil prices soaring. Investors should look for this signal. Tesla tumbled Thursday on weak deliveries.

item.title: SpaceX to launch military missile tracking satellites through new Space Force contract
item.description: The U.S. Space Force awarded SpaceX a $178.5 million task order on April 1, 2026 to launch missile tracking satellites for the Space Development Agency. The contract, designated SDA-4, covers two Falcon 9 launches beginning in Q3 2027, one from Cape Canaveral Space Force Station in Florida and on...

item.title: Cybercab Time
item.description: Robotaxi charging up! submitted by /u/ktrickstery [link] [comments]

item.title: Dow Jones Futures: Stock Market Resilient As Oil Prices Spike, Tesla Slumps; Jobs Report On Tap
item.description: The stock market rose strongly for the week, even with oil prices soaring. Investors should look for this signal. Tesla tumbled Thursday on weak deliveries.

item.title: Tesla Stock's Bad Year Just Got Even Worse. But Is This the Time to Buy Into the Electric-Car Maker's Spectacular Growth Story?
item.description: While the company just revealed that first-quarter deliveries were up year over year, the update also raised some concerns.

item.title: Tesla Needs Panasonic, BYD Doesn't — That Gap May Matter More Than You Think
item.description: Tesla, Inc’s latest push into Japan isn't just about service centers and Superchargers — it's a reminder of something the market may be underestimating: not all EV growth is created equal for suppliers. Because while Tesla scales, companies like Panasonic Holdings Corp scale with it. And while BY...

item.title: Stock Market Today, April 2: Tesla Falls After Vehicle Deliveries Miss Estimates
item.description: On April 2, 2026, investors weighed Tesla’s rare back-to-back delivery miss against rising production, storage growth, and its AI ambitions.

item.title: Tesla Reports 358,023 Deliveries, Misses Expectations for Second Straight Quarter
item.description: First-quarter deliveries fall short of 372,160 estimates despite 6.3% year-over-year growth

item.title: Tesla Q1 deliveries fall short of expectations. Stock drops.
item.description: Yahoo Finance Senior Autos Reporter Pras Subramanian joins Market Domination to break down the state of Tesla (TSLA) as the EV giant misses its first quarter delivery estimates.

item.title: Tesla Rival Rivian Tops Delivery Estimates With New Model Still Due
item.description: Rivian deliveries in the first quarter totaled 10,365 cars. Meanwhile, Tesla's were 358,023. Both stocks fell on Thursday.

item.title: Tesla Deliveries Grow. Elon Musk's EV Giant Reclaims Sales Crown.
item.description: Elon Musk's company delivered 408,386 of vehicles in the first quarter. Tesla stock fell ahead of the release but is up for the week.

item.title: Why Tesla Stock Is Down Today
item.description: Tesla's Shanghai boom masks looming global slowdown

item.title: Stock Market Rebounds Even As Oil Prices Skyrocket On Trump's Iran War Comments; Tesla, SpaceX, Eli Lilly In Focus: Weekly Review
item.description: The stock market snapped a five-week losing streak even as oil prices soared on President Trump's Iran war comments.

item.title: Stock Market Today: Dow Pares Losses On Hormuz News, But Oil Holds Gains; Ciena, Lumentum Surge (Live Coverage)
item.description: The Dow Jones index sold off Thursday on Trump's Iran speech as oil prices surged. Tesla stock skidded on deliveries.

item.title: Why Tesla Stock Fell After Q1 Deliveries
item.description: Hint: It's not just because of EVs.

item.title: Tesla’s Q1 delivery figures show Elon Musk was right
item.description: Tesla reported its Q1 delivery figures on Thursday, and the figures — solid but unspectacular — show that CEO Elon Musk was right about what the company’s most important production and division would be. We are seeing that shift occur in real time. Tesla delivered 358,023 vehicles in the first qu...

item.title: Tesla Deliveries Rise. Why the Stock Is Falling.
item.description: Tesla delivered a disappointing number of cars in the first quarter, despite rising oil prices. Tesla also deployed just 8.8 gigawatt-hours of battery storage in the first quarter, down from 14.2 gigawatt-hours in the fourth quarter. Tesla was updating its Model Y in 2025, one reason for weak sa...

item.title: Tesla Delivers 358,023 Vehicles in 1st Quarter — CHARTS & GRAPHS
item.description: Tesla delivered just 358,023 vehicles in the 1st quarter, which was a 6.3% increase over Q1 2025, but was also the second worst quarter for the company since Q3 2022. Meanwhile, the company produced 408,386 vehicles. Let’s take a little closer look at the vehicle deliveries, including some estima...

item.title: Auto & Transport Roundup: Market Talk
item.description: Find insight on Tesla, Daimler Truck, Maersk, Hapag-Lloyd and more in the latest Market Talks covering the auto and transport sector.

item.title: Tech, Media & Telecom Roundup: Market Talk
item.description: Find insight on Tesla, Nvidia’s deal with Marvell Technology and more in the latest Market Talks covering technology, media and telecom.

item.title: Tesla's First-Quarter Deliveries Miss Views as Wedbush Flags Tough Demand Backdrop
item.description: Tesla's (TSLA) first-quarter deliveries missed Wall Street's estimates as Wedbush Securities flagged

item.title: Tesla Keeps Momentum Going in China
item.description: Steady growth suggests demand is holding up despite rising competition.

item.title: Tesla Sales Rebound From Last Year’s Slump
item.description: After a year marked by sluggish electric-vehicle sales, Tesla’s final tally for the first quarter was 358,023 EVs delivered globally, missing analysts’ estimates of 368,900 deliveries, according to a consensus of 19 investment firms’ estimates published by Visible Alpha. Despite the growth from t...

item.title: Rising Tesla Sales in First Quarter Didn’t Beat Wall Street Expectations
item.description: The company delivered more cars than this time last year, but overall sales are still on the decline

item.title: Tesla Was Outdone by Rivian in the First Quarter. This Number Tells the Story.
item.description: Tesla and Rivian both grew their sales. But Rivian outpaced the larger EV maker on this crucial figure.
